User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the Auralook.uz application, storing core profile information and communication details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's unique email address for account access. This is used for login and identification.

telegramUsername.description: The user's Telegram username for receiving automated notifications about order status and other updates.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was last updated.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Stores detailed profile information for a user, specifically used by the AI Smart Size Advisor to provide personalized clothing size recommendations.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User associated with this profile. (Relationship: User 1:1 UserProfile)

heightCm.description: The user's height in centimeters, a key input for the AI Smart Size Advisor.

weightKg.description: The user's weight in kilograms, a key input for the AI Smart Size Advisor.

gender.description: The user's self-identified gender, used to tailor size recommendations (e.g., 'male', 'female', 'other').

desiredFit.description: The user's preferred clothing fit style (e.g., 'loose', 'regular', 'tight'), influencing size recommendations.

Look.title: Look
Look.description: Represents a curated outfit or 'look' displayed in the Auralook.uz Uzbek-only lookbook.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Look entity.

title.description: The title of the look in Uzbek.

description.description: A detailed description of the look in Uzbek.

mainImageUrl.description: URL for the high-resolution main image of the look.

thumbnailImageUrl.description: URL for a smaller thumbnail image of the look, optimized for UI display.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the look was first created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the look's details were last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a customer's order, tracking its details and status for automated updates and notifications.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed this order. (Relationship: User 1:N Order)

orderDate.description: The date and time when the order was placed.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'New', 'Confirmed', 'Shipped', 'Delivered', 'Cancelled').

totalAmount.description: The total monetary amount of the order, including shipping and taxes.

shippingAddress.description: The complete shipping address provided by the customer for this order.

customerNotes.description: Any additional notes or specific instructions provided by the customer for this order.

telegramNotificationSent.description: Flag indicating whether a real-time Telegram notification regarding this order's status has been sent to the customer.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order's status or details were last updated.

definition.description: Stores core user account information. Each document's ID is the user's authentication UID. Access is restricted to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user.

definition.description: Stores detailed profile information for a user, specific for the AI Smart Size Advisor. Each document's ID is the user's authentication UID, matching the 'userId' field within the document. Access is restricted to the owning user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of the user, which also serves as the document ID and the 'userId' field value.

definition.description: Contains curated outfit 'Looks' for the lookbook. Documents are publicly readable by all users (authenticated and unauthenticated). Write, update, and delete access is restricted to users with the 'look_creator' role.

params.name: lookId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific Look.

definition.description: Manages customer order details. Includes denormalized 'userId' for authorization independence. Accessible by the owning user (identified by 'userId' field) and by users with the 'order_manager' role for tracking and updates.

params.name: orderId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific customer order.

definition.description: Database-backed access control collection for 'order manager' roles. An existing document at this path grants the corresponding userId permission to manage orders.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of a user designated as an order manager.

definition.description: Database-backed access control collection for 'look creator' roles. An existing document at this path grants the corresponding userId permission to create, update, and delete looks.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique Firebase Authentication UID of a user designated as a look creator.
